title: Terpenoids and Related Compounds. Part-XXVl1. Molecular Rearrangements of 3α,4α-Epoxyfriedoolean-7-one
author: PASUPATI SENGUPTA
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, University of Kalyani, Nadia, West Bengal, India 

 Dry hydrogen chloride in chloroform eonverted 3α,4α-epoxyfriedoolean-7-one (VIII) into putranjivadione (X). The cation of borontrifluride etherate in benzene furnished (X) and 7-ketoglut­-5(IO)-en-3α-ol (XII), while that of aqueous perchloric acid on the epoxide furnished 7- ketofriedooleana-3β,4α-diol (XV). When the enol (XII) was oxidised with Jones' reagent glut-5(10)-en-3,7-dione (XIV) was obtained.
steps_raw:
Department of Chemistry, University of Kalyani, Nadia, West Bengal, India 

 Dry hydrogen chloride in chloroform eonverted 3α,4α-epoxyfriedoolean-7-one (VIII) into putranjivadione (X). The cation of borontrifluride etherate in benzene furnished (X) and 7-ketoglut­-5(IO)-en-3α-ol (XII), while that of aqueous perchloric acid on the epoxide furnished 7- ketofriedooleana-3β,4α-diol (XV). When the enol (XII) was oxidised with Jones' reagent glut-5(10)-en-3,7-dione (XIV) was obtained.
